figures.caption: Table 2: Performance of the proposed LLM-Guided TM on selected classification datasets. The bold entries indicate the highest performance, while bold and underlined indicate the second highest. A dash (–) indicates missing values not reported in literature. LLM-Guided TM results are averaged over 5 runs, and the includes standard deviation. Baseline results are drawn from literature and do not report variances, so significance testing could not be applied.
